skill_availability_goal: Verify that a site-less host can produce a complete preview from a maintainer-confirmed version fact source without issue #116/#117 handoffs, while every write still requires approval and a missing trusted fact source remains blocked.
prompt: 读取 release-package.md、已确认 changelog、版本 bump 证据与无可信事实源场景，生成可信场景的只读完整预览并判断第二场景。
